reasoning: At the super-GM level (Elo ~2789), a 1% increase equates to roughly +28 rating points. Accumulating +28 points over a brief timeframe of approximately three months (from Nov 2025 to Feb 2026) is extremely difficult, as it requires scoring +5 or +6 wins above mathematical expectation against top-tier opponents (e.g., heavily overperforming at a major event like Tata Steel). Past historical rating fluctuations of elite players demonstrate that three-month standard deviations are typically around 10-15 points, making a +28 jump roughly a +2 standard deviation event (around a 5% to 10% chance). Further, if the question originally requires this threshold to be met on "each" resolution date, it compounds the difficulty. As a result, the likelihood of this occurring is very low.
